nodes.title: About Size
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

By default, we are using 720p resolution. You can try 1920*1088 if you have a powerful GPU.

A cinematic slow-motion video based on the surreal high-fashion portrait style of the reference image. Against a solid black background, a pale mother wearing an elaborate, translucent red lace headdress and gown is holding a baby dressed in lime green lace. The video starts with the mother looking down. She slowly and deliberately opens her eyes, lifting her head to gaze directly into the camera. Her face remain straight, without any expression change, only opens her eyes. As she does this, she gently and gracefully tightens her embrace, pulling the baby closer to her chest. The baby remains sleeping without openning its eyes.
Simultaneously, the pink neon ring behind the mother begins to expand its edges until the neon pink color covers the whole background, and the lime green key light begins to radiate intensely, emitting a pulsing, brilliant light that casts dynamic glow and shadows across the intricate lace textures of their clothing. 
All movements are extremely slow, smooth, and gentle, as if captured with a super slow motion 600FPS camera. 
Photorealistic, high contrast lighting.

Create a vivid word-picture representation of this image include elements that characterize the subject, costume, prop elemts, the action, the background, layout and composition elements present on the scene, be sure to mention the style and mood of the scene. Like it would a film director or director of photography
Error: 403 PERMISSION_DENIED. {'error': {'code': 403, 'message': 'Your API key was reported as leaked. Please use another API key.', 'status': 'PERMISSION_DENIED'}}

A rain-slicked urban street in a dense metropolis at midnight. Rain droplets continuously hit the asphalt, creating expanding ripples in deep puddles that distort the vibrant reflections of electric blue and amber neon signage. Glowing billboards and LED screens flicker subtly, casting a rhythmic, pulsating light through the heavy atmosphere. Subtle steam rises from a nearby manhole, swirling into the cool air. Cinematic 55mm style, high-contrast nocturnal energy, sharp moving reflections.
A close-up, high-angle shot of a minimalist luxury apartment balcony overlooking a blurred city. A single white T-shirt draped over a modern chair sways gently in a soft midnight breeze. Through an open window, a hazy mist swirls slowly into the room, carrying the lingering scent of perfume and catching the steady blue glow of distant city lights. In the background, the bokeh of city traffic shimmers and shifts. Focus on the soft movement of fabric, glass textures, and the atmospheric mist.
An expansive, wide-angle landscape of the city skyline during the blue hour just before sunrise. Thick, cool fog rolls slowly and majestically over the skyscrapers as the seasons change. Fine frost crystals glisten on a nearby railing, catching the dim light. The sky undergoes a subtle, slow transition from deep navy to a pale, misty grey. The scene is quiet and empty, with only the slow movement of clouds and fog across the monochromatic blue landscape. Photorealistic, cinematic wide shot, serene and cold.

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
- Huggingface: [Lightricks/LTX-2.3](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/)
- Github: [LTX-2](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2)

## LTX-2.3 Prompting Tips

1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Visual Details**: Describe all visual details you want to appear in the video  
3. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene

## Report LTX-2.3 Issues
To report any issues when running this workflow, [go to GitHub](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo/issues)

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**latent_upscale_models**

- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

**checkpoints**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev.safetensors)

**loras**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-dev.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       ├── gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors
│       └── ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors
```

## Report other issues

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be update after the stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the update.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Concatenate
widgets_values: f/0.8 aperture, shallow and soft and realistic depth of field, realistic bokeh. the camera is smoothly pushing forward. hotspots of lights forming long velocity trails as the camera moves.

A rain-slicked urban street in a dense metropolis at midnight. Rain droplets continuously hit the asphalt, creating expanding ripples in deep puddles that distort the vibrant reflections of electric blue and amber neon signage. Glowing billboards and LED screens flicker subtly, casting a rhythmic, pulsating light through the heavy atmosphere. Subtle steam rises from a nearby manhole, swirling into the cool air. Cinematic 55mm style, high-contrast nocturnal energy, sharp moving reflections. f/0.8 aperture, realistic crispy bokeh.

realistic, live action, 3D render, blurry, low quality, morphing faces, flickering, extra limbs, distorted characters, slow motion, speed ramp, watermark, text on screen, poorly lit, flat colors, static no movement, wrong art style, anime, manga, wrong characters, incorrect voices, Pixar style, DreamWorks style, off model characters, inconsistent animation, dark lighting, wrong location, extra characters, missing characters

A close-up of a cheerful girl puppet with curly auburn yarn hair and wide button eyes, holding a small red umbrella above her head. Rain falls gently around her. She looks upward and begins to sing with joy in English: "It's raining, it's raining, I love it when its raining." Her fabric mouth opening and closing to a melodic tune. Her hands grip the umbrella handle as she sways slightly from side to side in rhythm. The camera holds steady as the rain sparkles against the soft lighting. Her eyes blink occasionally as she sings.

nodes.title: Frame Rate Note
widgets_values: Please make sure the frame rate value is the same in both boxes

Animated scene in the exact visual style of SpongeBob SquarePants cartoon, dark eerie Rock Bottom location, deep dark blue and purple underwater environment, strange angular bizarre architecture visible along the edges, dim bioluminescent lighting casting an eerie glow, Plankton tiny one eyed green villain walking alone through the dark empty Rock Bottom streets looking determined and purposeful, enormous towering sand wall slowly comes into view filling the entire frame ahead, massive imposing wall of packed sand stretching impossibly high disappearing into the dark water above, subtle barely perceptible light refraction hints at an enormous glass dome curving upward beyond the sand wall catching the faint bioluminescent light in an almost imperceptible shimmer, Plankton stops dead in his tracks and stares upward with his single eye wide with awe and says in his classic early Nickelodeon era squeaky nasally voice "there it is, the sand wall", dramatic ominous atmosphere, deep dark oceanic color grading, classic Nickelodeon SpongeBob animation quality, vibrant colors despite dark setting, fluid expressive animation, smooth 24fps
